item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Privacy Policy

1. Controller

Christian Friedrich Holsteinische Strasse 52 Berlin, 10717, Germany

Email: me@christianfriedrich.org

2. Overview of Data Processing

This website (christianfriedrich.org) is a static website without user accounts, contact forms, comment functions, or tracking. As little personal data as technically possible is processed.

3. Hosting and Server Log Files

3.1 Hosting Provider

This website is hosted by Reclaim Hosting, LLC, a US-based hosting provider located in Fredericksburg, Virginia, USA.

Provider: Reclaim Hosting, LLC, 2324 Plank Rd, Fredericksburg, VA 22401, USA Website: https://www.reclaimhosting.com
